title: Italian-Style Bibimbap Jjigae
description: A creative fusion of Italian and Korean flavors, this bibimbap jjigae is a hearty, comforting dish that's perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Cook the Italian sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the onion and mushrooms to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the bibimbap-style mixed vegetables, Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and rice vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked Korean-style fermented rice to the skillet and stir-fry everything together.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 375°F for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is heated through and the top is lightly browned.
Garnish with Italian basil and serve hot.
